group.name: Stage Kit Audio Effects
group.description: Audio-mode rotation and sweep effects adapted from Stage Kit

effects.name: Sweep Colour (Audio)
effects.description: Sweeps a colour across target lights with staggered delays.

variables.name: lowBrightness
variables.description: Brightness level to fade out to (same colour as sweep)

effects.name: Rotation Clockwise (Audio)
effects.description: Rotates a colour clockwise across target lights, beat-synchronised. Uses 3 chained set-color transitions per light.

variables.name: waitUntilCondition
variables.description: Event type to count per phase (beat, keyframe)

variables.name: waitUntilConditionCount
variables.description: Additional condition count offset applied to all phases

variables.name: waitUntilTime
variables.description: Ms to wait per phase when waitUntilCondition is delay

variables.name: groupSize
variables.description: Iterate in groups of this many lights (e.g. 2 for opposite pairs)

notes.label: Notes
notes.note:
For each normally increments by 1.
Group Size lets us increment by X, while also reducing
the number of iterations / X.

E.g. groupSize 2 means for each step we iterate two
lights instead of one, and halve the total number
of iterations. 

This is used by cues like Score to move groups of two
defined lights in a clockwise pattern.
notes.title: For Each Light & Group Size

effects.name: Rotation Counter-Clockwise (Audio)
effects.description: Rotates a colour counter-clockwise across target lights, beat-synchronised. Uses 3 chained set-color transitions per light.

variables.name: waitUntilCondition
variables.description: Event type to count per phase (beat, keyframe)

variables.name: waitUntilConditionCount
variables.description: Additional condition count offset applied to all phases

variables.name: waitUntilTime
variables.description: Ms to wait per phase when waitUntilCondition is delay

variables.name: groupSize
variables.description: Iterate in groups of this many lights (e.g. 2 for opposite pairs)

effects.name: Diagonal Sweep (Audio)
effects.description: Two CCW rotations offset by half ring for diagonal pair stepping on beat
